calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Adrian Colley, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiffs Martha Wong and Lena Choo are NOT present.
Attorney Nils Rosenquest for the plaintiff.
Defendants David Fusiler and Michael Newman are present.
Attorney Jeff Dulga appearing for defendant Fusiler. Attorney Carolyn Gold appearing for defendant Michael Newman in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of July 9, 2018 is vacated.
